mapper.select: select id, nickname, account, avatar, bio, role, location, followers from profile order by id limit 1
select skill from profile_skill where profile_id = #{profileId} order by sort_order, id
select id, label, url from profile_link where profile_id = #{profileId} order by sort_order, id

select t.id, t.name, count(a.id) as article_count from tag t left join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id left join article a on a.id = at.article_id and a.status = 'PUBLISHED' group by t.id, t.name, t.sort_order order by t.sort_order, t.id

select count(distinct a.id) from article a
inner join article_tag at on at.article_id = a.id
where a.status = 'PUBLISHED'
and at.tag_id = #{tagId}
select id, title, summary, cover, category, content, published_at, updated_at, views, likes, comments from article where id = #{id} and status = 'PUBLISHED'
select t.name from tag t inner join article_tag at on at.tag_id = t.id where at.article_id = #{articleId} order by t.sort_order, t.id
mapper.insert: insert into article ( title, summary, cover, category, content, status, published_at, updated_at, views, likes, comments ) values ( #{title}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{category}, #{content}, #{status}, #{publishedAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{views}, #{likes}, #{comments} )
mapper.select: select id from tag where name = #{name} limit 1
select id, title, description, answer_count, updated_at from question order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 10
select t.name from tag t inner join question_tag qt on qt.tag_id = t.id where qt.question_id = #{questionId} order by t.sort_order, t.id
